name: Chocolate Madness
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup unsalted butter or margarine, at room temperature
1/2 teaspoon mint extract, or other flavoring, to taste
mint leaves or whipped cream -- for decoration
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream in a small, heavy saucepan until it reaches boiling point.
2. Cut the butter into chunks and add them, along with chocolate chips, egg yolks, and mint extract, to a food processor or blender. Add the hot cream and process until smooth (about 30 seconds). Adjust the flavoring as desired.
3. Pour the mixture into small dessert dishes and chill in the freezer for about 45 minutes, or refrigerate for several hours. Decorate with mint leaves or whipped cream if desired.
Makes 6 servings, each being half a cup.
Timesaver Tip: The recipe can be prepared up to one day in advance and stored, covered, in the refrigerator. Microwave Version: Pour the cream into a glass bowl or 2-cup glass measure. Microwave on 100% power until tiny bubbles break the surface (2 to 3 minutes). Continue with step 2. Preparation time and timesaver tips remain the same as above.
